name: buffer
notes: Supports require('buffer') and require('node:buffer'). It exports the global Buffer constructor, isUtf8 for Buffer/ArrayBuffer/typed-array inputs, and resolveObjectURL. Blob object URL creation is not yet supported, so resolveObjectURL returns undefined for all inputs.

apis.name: Buffer
apis.notes: Exports the same constructor as globalThis.Buffer, including base64/utf8 decoding, allocation, concatenation, binary integer I/O, views, and array-like indexing.

apis.name: Buffer.from(value[, encoding])
apis.notes: Creates a Buffer from a Buffer, byte array, JavaScript array, enumerable value, or string with utf8, hex, or base64 decoding.

apis.name: Buffer.alloc(size[, fill[, encoding]])
apis.notes: Allocates a zeroed Buffer, optionally filled from a byte, string, or Buffer.

apis.name: Buffer.allocUnsafe(size)
apis.notes: Allocates an uninitialized Buffer.

apis.name: Buffer.byteLength(value[, encoding])
apis.notes: Returns the encoded byte length of a Buffer, byte array, or string.

apis.name: Buffer.concat(list[, totalLength])
apis.notes: Concatenates Buffer-compatible binary values, optionally truncating or padding to totalLength.

apis.name: Buffer.isBuffer(value)
apis.notes: Returns whether value is a JROC Buffer.

apis.name: Buffer.compare(buf1, buf2)
apis.notes: Lexicographically compares two Buffers.

apis.name: buffer.length / buffer.byteLength / buffer.byteOffset / buffer.buffer
apis.notes: Exposes view length, byte length, byte offset, and the backing ArrayBuffer.

apis.name: buffer[index]
apis.notes: Supports indexed byte reads and writes for in-bounds integer indexes.

apis.name: buffer.toString([encoding[, start[, end]]])
apis.notes: Decodes Buffer contents using utf8, hex, or base64 encoding.

apis.name: buffer.slice([start[, end]]) / buffer.subarray([start[, end]])
apis.notes: Returns Buffer views over the existing backing storage.

apis.name: buffer.copy(target[, targetStart[, sourceStart[, sourceEnd]]])
apis.notes: Copies bytes into a target Buffer and returns the copied byte count.

apis.name: buffer.equals(other)
apis.notes: Compares Buffer contents for equality.

apis.name: buffer.indexOf(value[, byteOffset[, encoding]]) / buffer.lastIndexOf(value[, byteOffset[, encoding]]) / buffer.includes(value[, byteOffset[, encoding]])
apis.notes: Searches for byte, string, or Buffer values.

apis.name: buffer.fill(value[, offset[, end[, encoding]]])
apis.notes: Fills a Buffer range from a byte, string, or Buffer value.

apis.name: buffer.write(string[, offset[, length[, encoding]]])
apis.notes: Writes an encoded string and returns the number of bytes written.

apis.name: buffer.readInt8/readUInt8/readInt16BE/readInt16LE/readUInt16BE/readUInt16LE/readInt32BE/readInt32LE/readUInt32BE/readUInt32LE
apis.notes: Reads signed and unsigned 8-, 16-, and 32-bit integer values in big- and little-endian formats.

apis.name: buffer.writeInt8/writeUInt8/writeInt16BE/writeInt16LE/writeUInt16BE/writeUInt16LE/writeInt32BE/writeInt32LE/writeUInt32BE/writeUInt32LE
apis.notes: Writes signed and unsigned 8-, 16-, and 32-bit integer values in big- and little-endian formats.

apis.name: buffer.readFloatLE/readFloatBE/readDoubleLE/readDoubleBE
apis.notes: Reads IEEE 754 single- and double-precision values in big- and little-endian formats.

apis.name: buffer.writeFloatLE/writeFloatBE/writeDoubleLE/writeDoubleBE
apis.notes: Writes IEEE 754 single- and double-precision values in big- and little-endian formats.

apis.name: isUtf8(input)
apis.notes: Returns whether a Buffer, ArrayBuffer, or typed-array input contains well-formed UTF-8.

apis.name: resolveObjectURL(id)
apis.notes: Exported for Undici compatibility. Blob object URL creation is not yet supported, so this returns undefined.
